name: atlas-blob-compute-smoke-d7c
description: E5 Phase 7d Step 8 — D7c smooth-min omega uplift enabled. The atlas-blob scene is all smooth-min (12 spheres smooth-unioned), so u.sceneAllSmoothMinOnly is 1 and the uplift activates: omega 1.2 → 1.8 effective. Verifies D7c path runs without crash + produces identical pixel output (the uplift is a safe upper bound for smooth-min SDFs — sphere-trace invariant preserved). No pipeline rebuild needed since D7c is a runtime flag, not a compile-time override.
